line.token: "SELECT ID, setting_name, setting_value FROM tbl_settings ORDER BY ':orderBy' "
SELECT ID, setting_name, setting_value FROM tbl_settings ORDER BY '
SELECT ID, setting_name, setting_value FROM tbl_settings WHERE ID BETWEEN 8 AND 11 ORDER BY '
"SELECT ID, setting_name, setting_value FROM tbl_settings WHERE ID = ':ID' "
"SELECT ID, setting_name, setting_value FROM tbl_settings WHERE setting_name = ? LIMIT 1"
/*** add each option to the dropdown ***/
